case_title: WOOD, EUGENIA VS MEDRANO, JUAN MANUEL et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WOOD, EUGENIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEDRANO, JUAN MANUEL JUAN MANUEL MEDRANO C/O ASTA REST. $4,900.00 PRINCIPAL, $23.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,923.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

TRIAL RESET TO DEC-15-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02 TRIAL OF NOV-17-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
